_about: Sample theme skin — colors by DSL type, demonstrating the use of ui_render.py --skin (ui_render.py <screenID>.md out.html --skin <this file>). Keys = DSL types; @canvas is a reserved key (canvas background color + default text); a variant (e.g. button·primary) not listed falls back to the base type (button). This file is a sample only; users replace the coloring per their own art style / visual spec (designated by project-charter
